hero.title: Hairspray
hero.reason: In honor of Global Day of Parents, we celebrate the loving and supportive parents in this film, like Edna Turnblad, who encourage their children to be themselves and follow their dreams.
hero.blurb: This musical masterpiece is full of energy, catchy songs, and a talented cast. With its positive message and upbeat vibe, it's the perfect film to watch with your family.

released.title: Knocked Up
released.reason: Released today in 2007, this hilarious and heartwarming film still resonates with audiences today, thanks to its relatable characters and realistic portrayal of unexpected pregnancy.
released.blurb: Seth Rogen and Katherine Heigl deliver outstanding performances as two people from different walks of life brought together by a one-night stand. The film's witty dialogue and comedic supporting cast make it a laugh-out-loud classic.

birthday.title: Heathers
birthday.reason: Happy birthday to Heather Langenkamp, born June 1, 1970, who starred as the iconic Heather Duke in this cult classic teen comedy.
birthday.blurb: This dark and satirical film is a timeless commentary on high school cliques and social hierarchy. With its witty dialogue and memorable characters, it's a must-watch for any 80s movie fan.

awful.title: Ballistic: Ecks vs. Sever
awful.reason: this action film is infamous for its convoluted plot, poor acting, and excessive use of slow motion, making it a laughingstock among movie critics and fans.
awful.blurb: With a whopping 0% approval rating on Rotten Tomatoes, this movie is a masterpiece of bad filmmaking. Its over-the-top action sequences and cringe-worthy one-liners make it a hilarious trainwreck to watch.
